titleStmt.title: SII 27.147: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 147. (A.R. No. 580 of 1929-30.) CHOKKĀḌI, (near Yēṇaguḍḍe) UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 2) set up in the prākāra of Mahālingēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1396 (expired, 1397 current) Jaya, Chaitra śu. 13, Thursday corresponding to 1474 A.D., March 31.
The record registers an agreement as in No. 146, above and details the annulment of certain privileges till then enjoyed by some members of both the parties. Hariyappa-sēnabōva wrote the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . śrī sarasvatyai namaḥ . śrī gurubhyō namaḥ . nirvighnamastu namastuṁga śiraścuṁ
bi caṁdracāmara cāravē . trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyuda
[ya śaka]varuṣa 1396 saṁdu yēḷaneya varttamāna jaya saṁvatsarada cayitra śuddha 13gulu śrīmanma
hā rājādhirāja paramēśvara vīrapratāpa virūpākṣamahārāyaru vijaya nagariya rājadhā
niyalū samastavarnnadharmāśramaṁgaḷanu pālisi sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājya Ayiśvaryavanu
pratipālisutihakāladalū Ā virūpākṣa mahārāyara nirūpadiṁda viṭharasavoḍeyaru bārakūra rā
jyavanāḷuva kāladalū bārakūra hattukēri hadināṟumaṁdi seṭṭikāṟaṟu yeḷunūṟa yeppa
ttēḷeḷame voḷagāda nakharahaṁjamānada samastahalara muṁdiṭu yeraḍu pakha dikina baḷiyavarū mūḍi
laru niḍuṁburaru Aṟuvaru ballāḷugaḷu sahitavāgi koṭṭabāḷa Aṟuvariya patrakaṭṭaḷe
voḷagāda samastahalaru seṭṭikāṟarige barasikoṭṭa śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare niḍuṁbūra
ru voḍeŪra gaḍiyalū Agaḷa gadali yeraḍu pakada baḷiU niḍuṁburaru koḍikaṭṭidu rasa
ṟamaleha yi samasta kaṭiḷeyavaru niḍuṁburaranu voḍeŪra halavuseṭṭikāṟaru
saṁtayisidarāgi yi samastarū voppi māḍida śāsana pramāṇina kaṭaḷeya vivara voḍeŪra catu
ssīmeya vivara haravariya gōḷiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu hoḷeyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu beṁgareyiṁdaṁ
mūḍalu yettunaḍava hedāriyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu mataṁ Aṇuveya gaḍiguḍagaliṁdaṁ teṁkalu
bhūtapāṁḍyana jatikaliṁdaṁ baḍagalu yī gaḍiyiṁda voḷage mūḍilarige niḍuṁburarige Aṟuva
ru ballāḷugaḷige tama sīme saṁmaṁdhavilla mēle sāliyabaḷi taḷaṁkuḷa baḷi Āriyabaḷi yi mūṟabaḷi mū
ḍilapakhadavoḷage niḍuṁbura pakhadavoḷage koṁḍātanabaḷi haṁguḷabaḷi yi yeraḍu baḷisahavāgi A
yidu baḷiyavaru netiyali beṁgereyakaṭada gaṁḍumakaḷu voḍeŪra catussīmeyali yi
rabāradu Agaḷiyiṁda voḷage mūḍilapakhada mūṟu baḷiUḷavaru maneya kaṭida
re niḍuṁburapakhada yeraḍu baḷiyavaru maneya mūṟivaru niḍuṁbura pakhada yeraḍu
baḷimaneyakaṭidare mūḍilapakhada mūṟu baḷiyavaru maneya mūṟivaru voḍeŪra ga
ḍiyoḷage mūḍilaru niḍuṁburaru Aṟuvaru balāḷugaḷige biḍusalladu Aṇikuḍisalladu sā
lavakoḷasaladu bāḷaAdi Aṟuvāgava yirisa salladu mūlava koḍasalladu kuruvaḷa koḍasalladu
baṁṭage jōḷasaladu yi śāsana pramāṇige voḍeŪra Aṟuvaru seṭṭikāṟara voḷage tapidare
Ayidu baḷiya hokkubaḷasi tappida seṭṭikāṟa sāviṟada yiṁnūṟa 32 hoṁnu tetu
naṁma kūṭake baharu yippattayeraḍara voḷage Ārobbaru tappi Ayyabaḷiya hokku baḷasida
re Avara keyyali hattukērige voleyamuṟissuvaru Ācaṁdrārkavāgi na
ḍavaṁtāgi bārakūra hattukēri yeraḍu pakha dikinabaḷi mūḍilaru niḍuṁburaru Aṟuvaru ba
llāḷugaḷu voḍeŪra halaru seṭikāṟaru sahitavāgi barasinaṭṭa śilāśāsana yi śāsana pramā
ṇege Ārutapidavaru vāraṇāsiyali sāvirada yiṁnūṟu kavileya vadhisida dōṣake hōha
ru yi śāsana pramāṇige bārakūra hattu kēri hadināṟumaṁdi seṭikāṟaru yeḷunūṟa ye
ppatteḷame voḷagāda nakharahaṁjamānada samastahalara voppa śrī nārāyaṇadēvaru Ā Ū
roḷageyeṟa ge hattakke yeraḍara Upacāravanu Aṟuvaru seṭikāṟarige ko
ṭṭu varu Āruvārakke hattakeyeṟaḍa koṭṭu bāḷuvaru koḍade yiddare huṭṭukeṭṭu na
savaḍḍi Aṁtara Āruvāra yī Ūroḷage salladu mūḍilara voppa siddā
rara voppa Aṟuvaru seṭṭikāṟara voppa Eppatteraḍu halaravoppa
śrī vināyakadēvaru . tugumādēvi . vīrabhadra dēvaru . yiṁ tappada ke sākṣi
nārāyaṇa dēvaru . Aṟuvaru balāḷugaḷa voppa . yeraḍu pakhadikina baḷiho
de samastara voppa hariyappa sēnabōvana baraha subhamastu maṁgaḷa mahā
śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.147 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
